summary: Completed testing of Code Quality Report fixes for Printsout e-commerce app. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with refactored sub-components working properly.

test_credentials.note: Admin requires 2FA with TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Code Quality Report fixes verified: (1) sessionStorage migration complete - AuthContext uses sessionStorage at lines 16,31,73,82 and AdminContext at lines 15,36,39, (2) No localStorage usage in auth contexts, (3) No console.log in AdminSettings or Cart, (4) Checkout page split into 3 sub-components (CheckoutShippingForm, PaymentMethodSelector, OrderSummary) all working, (5) AdminLogin split into LoginForms and TwoFactorForms sub-components, (6) AdminSettings split into ShippingTaxSection, DiscountCodesSection, TwoFASection, (7) AdminOrders uses OrderDetailPanel with useMemo for performance, (8) Shared pricing utility in /utils/pricing.js used by Cart and Checkout, (9) Backend email_service.py module properly imported, (10) All catch blocks have proper error handling with toast messages.

verified_features.homepage_loads: ✓ Homepage loads at / with hero section
verified_features.products_page_loads: ✓ Products page loads at /produkter with 14 products
verified_features.product_detail_page: ✓ Product detail page loads with name, price, design button, add-to-cart button
verified_features.cart_page: ✓ Cart page loads with shared pricing utility (subtotal + shipping + VAT calculation)
verified_features.checkout_page: ✓ Checkout page loads with all 3 sub-components: CheckoutShippingForm (email, phone, firstname, lastname, address, postalcode, city), PaymentMethodSelector (card, swish, klarna), OrderSummary (coupon input, apply button, submit button)
verified_features.admin_login_page: ✓ Admin login page loads with LoginForm sub-component (email, password, login button, forgot password link)
verified_features.customer_login_page: ✓ Customer login page loads with forgot password link
verified_features.no_console_logs: ✓ No console.log in AdminSettings.js or Cart.js
verified_features.shared_pricing_utility: ✓ calculatePricing function in /utils/pricing.js used by Cart and Checkout

code_quality_verification.empty_catch_blocks: All catch blocks have proper error handling with toast.error() messages
code_quality_verification.sessionStorage_migration: Complete - AuthContext (lines 16,31,73,82) and AdminContext (lines 15,36,39) use sessionStorage

component_splitting.AdminLogin.js: ~120 lines, uses LoginForm, ForgotPasswordForm, ResetPasswordForm, SetupTwoFactor, VerifyTwoFactor
component_splitting.AdminOrders.js: Uses OrderDetailPanel with useMemo for performance

code_quality_verification.backend_refactoring: server.py imports from email_service.py, init_data split into _get_seed_products/_get_seed_reviews

frontend_ui_tests.Product Detail: ✓ Loads with all elements (name, price, design button, cart button)
